prompt: Create a vertical photorealistic portrait of an elegant adult woman seated on the floor in a traditional Chinese-style wooden room, wearing a glossy white silk qipao-inspired bridal outfit with delicate frog closures, pearl accents, tassels, and a high side slit. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered opaque square censor block in a muted brown skin-tone color. She has long wavy dark brown hair flowing over her shoulders, decorated with exactly two white floral pearl hair ornaments and exactly two translucent white ribbon bows. She wears exactly two sheer white opera gloves, exactly two white high-heeled Mary Jane shoes with ankle straps, and a sheer white stocking detail with pearl-and-flower trim on one thigh. Pose her sitting low with both knees raised close to the camera, one gloved hand near her face, creating a soft fashion editorial composition. The setting includes exactly one warm glowing paper lantern on a wooden table to the left, exactly one small white teapot on a low table in the background, dark wooden furniture, shoji-style window grids, hanging calligraphy scrolls, and white blossom branches on the right. Use warm natural window light, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, realistic skin and fabric texture, high-end cosplay photography aesthetics, muted beige and ivory tones, and a 9:16 vertical crop. Keep the mood graceful, serene, and luxurious; no extra text, no watermark.
